name: Home Assistant MCP for Xiaozhi
what_it_does: Home Assistant MCP server optimized for Xiaozhi AI assistant integration — enabling Xiaozhi and similar AI voice/chat assistants to control Home Assistant smart home devices, query entity states, trigger automations, and integrate with Chinese smart home ecosystems through Home Assistant's REST API.
use_cases: Controlling smart home devices via Xiaozhi voice commands from home control agents
Querying device states and sensor readings from monitoring agents
Triggering Home Assistant automations from AI assistant agents
Integrating Chinese smart home brands via Home Assistant from compatibility agents
Building voice-controlled home automation with Chinese AI assistants
Scene and automation management from smart home agents
not_for: Teams not using Home Assistant or Xiaozhi AI
Western AI assistants without Xiaozhi protocol support
Direct hardware control without Home Assistant
best_when: A user in the Chinese smart home ecosystem uses Xiaozhi AI with Home Assistant — bridging Xiaozhi's AI capabilities with Home Assistant's device control and automation engine.
avoid_when: You use Home Assistant with other AI assistants — use the standard home-assistant MCP instead.

auth.notes: Home Assistant Long-Lived Access Token required. Generate from HA profile page. HA instance URL must be configured and accessible.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Home Assistant and this MCP are free and open source
pricing.notes: Home Assistant is free open source. Community MCP is free. Smart home hardware costs separate.

performance.rate_limits: Local HA instance — no external rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Home Assistant must be running and accessible from MCP server
Xiaozhi-specific protocol may limit compatibility with non-Xiaozhi agents
Long-Lived Access Token grants broad HA access — create dedicated token
Community MCP from Chinese developer — documentation primarily in Chinese
HA entity naming conventions vary by integration — agent needs context
Device control operations affect physical home equipment
agent_readiness.security_notes: HA access token. Use HTTPS if HA is remote. Community MCP for Chinese market. Physical device control — use carefully.

security_score_components.security_notes: HA access token. HTTPS. Community MCP. Physical device control is privileged.
